case_title: AETNA FINANCE CO INC. DBA ITT FINANCIAL SERVICES VS BORJA PETER

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY AETNA FINANCE CO INC. DBA ITT FINANCIAL SERVICES (SF4) AS TO DEFENDANT BORJA PETER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-30-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06
